Name: Golden Thread
Description: Link an ally with healing and debuff resistance

Name: Solar Edict
Description: Telegraphed solar strike on a target area

Name: Siphon of the Twin Suns
Description: Channel a large solar attack while the caster remains vulnerable

Name: Desiccant Compound
Description: Reduces mana regeneration and weakens water-based abilities

Name: Forbidden Reagent
Description: Applies an alchemical poison that reduces healing received

Name: Academy Cipher
Description: Reveals magical defenses and increases damage received from counters

Name: Thermal Collapse
Description: Destabilizes water and solar defensive systems causing silence and damage over time
